sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 380 of 2017 ITRA 381 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 24.11.2025 These reference applications are pending since 2017 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On 07.08.2018 time was sought to reformulate the questions of law. No such questions have been filed and even today Mr. Aftab Ali, advocate holding brief for Ch. Mehmood Anwer, advocate for the applicant and merely seeks time for no cogent reason. It appears that the applicant department is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
